2023

Mahfel

Musical Dance Performance

A performative show reconstructing Bedouin wedding ceremonies from different regions of Tunisia through a contemporary lens. Over 100 participants at the Festival de Carthage.

Watch video ↗

Mahfel reconstructs the traditions of Bedouin wedding ceremonies from different regions of Tunisia, while valuing this intangible musical heritage through a contemporary lens. It blends instruments both traditional and modern.

Mahfel is an immersion into diverse artistic styles, combining rhythms such as Jerbi, Fazzani, Ghayta, Saadawi, Drazi, Buzayqa, Shawi, Murrabba, Bu Nawara, as well as influences from rock, blues, jazz, and more.

This grand performance features over 100 participants including musicians, vocalists, dancers, and singers. Presented at the Festival de Carthage 2023.

Credits
Concept & DirectionFadhel EL Jaziri
Co-ChoreographyHaroun Ayari & Malek Sebai
TypeMusical Dance Performance
Year2023
VenueFestival de Carthage
